title: All-atomic simulation of DMPC bilayer with PME and with RFZ
author: Nesterenko Alexey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We have performed simulations of DMPC to check if the  reaction-field-zero  mode of calculating electrostatics is a good substitute for PME if we want to avoid PME for some reasons (e.g. for stress calculations). We started this simulation from the configuration deposited by Matti Javanainen (10.5281/zenodo.6943413). We performed two simulations of about 500 ns with the same protocol but at 313 K. Protocol for reaction-field-zero is supplemented as well. POPE simulated with the same RFZ protocol is deposited in a separate dataset (10.5281/zenodo.8435138).
